GuideBear Grinder Email Campaign Command CenterV18

21 templates  /  5 segments  /  A+B versions  /  HubSpot live API  /  AI insights  /  Email Compliance Check  /  V18

Start Here
Pick Your Audience

Choose who you are sending to. Templates load filtered and ready.

What Each Tab Does - Look Down

The bottom bar is your main navigation. Tabs split into two groups.

Campaign Tools - Live HubSpot Actions
TabWhat It DoesQuick Tip
SendBuild and push campaigns to HubSpot. Pick template, select list, run compliance, schedule or send.Always run Email Compliance Check before pushing.
StatsTrack open rates, CTR, unsubscribes, and bounces per template. Syncs live from HubSpot.Hit Sync after sends to pull real numbers.
ConnectEnter your HubSpot Private App token. Tests connection and loads your contact lists.Do this first. Nothing sends without a connection.
Template Tools - Edit and Export Individual Emails
TabWhat It DoesQuick Tip
PreviewRead-only view of any template. Click a template in the sidebar to load it.Review before editing so you have the right one selected.
EditClick any text in the email to edit inline. Toolbar for bold, italic, alignment. Reset restores original.Edits reset on reload. Copy to HubSpot first to save.
ExportCopies HubSpot-ready HTML to your clipboard. Paste into HubSpot source editor.If clipboard is blocked, copy manually from the text box.
HS ViewShows how the email renders inside HubSpot: table layout, tokens visible.Check this before every send to catch layout issues.
Quick Start

Follow in order. Skipping Connect means nothing sends.

STEP 1Connect - Enter your HubSpot Private App token, tap Test Connection. Lists load automatically.
STEP 2Pick a template from the sidebar. Tap Preview to review, Edit to customize.
STEP 3Send - Name the campaign, confirm reply-to is Hello@BearGrinder.com, select list, run Email Compliance Check, push as draft or scheduled.
STEP 4Stats - After sending, hit Sync to pull live open rates, clicks, and unsubscribes.

Confirm all codes are active in Shopify before any send. Kevin codes are for personal outreach only.

Version History
VersionDateChanges
V18Mar 2026Clean rebuild. Audience picker. See All Templates. Send Preview Email. Report a Bug. Version collapse. B2C. Logo corrected. Spam footers. Special category. No patents. Em-dashes removed.
V15-V17Mar 2026Mobile UI, bottom nav, HubSpot API, campaign builder, AI scoring, compliance, analytics, connect, tooltips, coupon codes.
V4-V14Mar 2026Initial builds through PuffCo-grade redesign, photography, mobile sidebar, A/B versions, editing toolbar.
Built Different.
The V3 Bear Grinder. Now shipping.

Hi [firstname],

We built Bear Grinder because we were tired of grinders that fight back.

Sticky threads. Metal in your herb. The slow decline where something that used to work great now barely does.

We fixed all of it.

FEATURE
Magnetic Closure

Neodymium magnets. No threads. No jamming. No cross-threading - ever.

FEATURE
608 Ball Bearing

Three to four rotations, done. Gets easier every time - not harder.

FEATURE
Precision Tooth Design

High-low pattern. Fluffy, airy, even grind. Preserves trichomes, terpenes, and flower structure.

PROMO CODE
BEAR20
20% off at checkout
Early bird window - two weeks only. Ships April.
SHOP NOW

Come try it. You'll feel it in the first spin.

Amit
Founder, Bear Grinder
